```{r }
G <- "Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit." |> cooccur()
G
G <- G |> tidygraph::as_tbl_graph()
Tbl_graph <- G |> tidygraph::as_tbl_graph()
G
G |> tblgraph_to_tbl()
```
```{r tblgraph_to_tbl <- function(Tbl_graph) {
  Tbl_graph |>
    tidygraph::activate(edges) |>
    # dplyr::filter(n > min_threshold) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      n1 = .N()$name[from], # Get node name for 'from'
      n2 = .N()$name[to] # Get node name for 'to'
    ) |>
    tibble::as_tibble() |>
    dplyr::select(n1, n2, n)
}
}
```
```{r }
tblgraph_to_tbl <- function(Tbl_graph) {
  Tbl_graph |>
    tidygraph::activate(edges) |>
    # dplyr::filter(n > min_threshold) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      n1 = tidygraph::.N()$name[from],
      n2 = tidygraph::.N()$name[to]
    ) |>
    tibble::as_tibble() |>
    dplyr::select(n1, n2, n)
}
```
